name: Witches' Hats
recipeIngredient: 1 oz unsweetened baking chocolate squares, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a saucepan, melt the unsweetened chocolate and marshmallows.
3. Add the corn syrup to the saucepan and continue melting until smooth.
4. Place the puffed rice cereal in a shallow pan.
5. Bake for 10 minutes in the preheated oven.
6. Remove from the oven and place the puffed rice cereal in a prepared bowl.
7. Pour the melted chocolate mixture over the puffed rice cereal, stirring to coat evenly.
8. Form the mixture into 8 cones, pressing the larger end to create a brim.
9. In a double boiler, melt the semisweet chocolate chips until smooth.
10. Dip each cone into the melted chocolate, coating completely.
11. Place the coated cones on wax paper to cool and harden before serving.
